title: Office Hours update: New session time on Tuesdays at 2pm AEDT 💡

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Office hours update: We are expanding our Office Hours offering!

We are now hosting an additional Office Hours session every Tuesday at 3 pm AEDT!

weekly office hours 1_1 (3)1920×1920 98.7 KB

This session is in addition to our existing session which we hold every Wednesday at 5 pm EDT (Thursday at 8 am AEDT).

Please use this link to sign up for either session: https://wkf.ms/43ZC8Bg

Our Office Hours session is your time to ask any of your workflow questions, provide feedback, or just get some general platform guidance!

See you there
